questions: Q1: Are all CLI changes correct and backward-compatible?
Q2: Does the ticket ID resolution work for both agents and external users?

answers.answer: Yes. hxFetch basePath defaults to /api/inspect preserving backward compatibility. Comments list and post commands correctly use basePath: /api. CLI entry point routes the comments subcommand. Typecheck and build pass.
evidence: src/index.ts lines 39-43: case 'comments' dispatches to runComments

answers.answer: Yes. resolveTicketId in src/comments/index.ts checks --ticket flag first, then HELIX_TICKET_ID env var, then exits with a clear error message. Agents in sandboxes will have HELIX_TICKET_ID set by the orchestrator; external users can pass --ticket explicitly.
evidence: src/comments/index.ts lines 11-19: resolveTicketId checks flag, then env var, then exits
src/helix-workflow/orchestrator.ts line 1166: export HELIX_TICKET_ID in sandbox env.sh

statement: CLI code review complete. All changes are correct: hxFetch generalization, comments list/post commands, ticket ID resolution. No issues found; no changes needed.
